summary: Matched a substantial early block of sysdolphin/baselib sislib by refining SIS text/camera allocation code, correcting sislib prototypes and data declarations, and updating GALE01 symbols for newly identified data/string boundaries. decomp.dev reported +3048 matched bytes, 13 new sislib function matches, and 3 additional sislib improvements, with only a tiny 3-byte percentage regression in HSD_SisLib_803A84BC.

key_files.role: Main matching work: rewrote/refined allocation, text-list cleanup, camera setup, SIS string copy/search helpers, and added an implementation for HSD_SisLib_803A7548.
Updated public prototypes and struct field types, removed obsolete externs/types, and exposed corrected HSD_SisLib_803A7548/HSD_SisLib_803A84BC signatures.
Adjusted sislib data object sizes and split several HSD_SisLib_8040C4xx/8040C5xx symbols into explicit string/data entries.
Updated callsite for HSD_SisLib_803A7548 to pass the newly identified integer argument.
Removed stale static function declarations unrelated to the sislib match state.

what_changed: Declared sislib camera data more concretely: added wobj.h, introduced static HSD_WObjDesc entries HSD_SisLib_8040C490/HSD_SisLib_8040C4A4, and initialized HSD_SisLib_8040C4B8 as HSD_CameraDescPerspective instead of a bare HSD_CObjDesc.
Made HSD_SisLib_804D1110 a static HSD_Archive* array in sislib.c and removed its extern declaration from sislib.h, while leaving HSD_SisLib_804D1124 externally visible.

Reworked HSD_SisLib_803A5798 allocation logic for closer matching: cleaner best-fit traversal, newline-correct OSReport strings, sizeof(sislib_UnkAllocData), and typed pointer arithmetic such as HSD_SisLib_804D7970 + 1.

Corrected HSD_Text linked-list traversal and deletion routines to use x50 as the next-text link and x54 as the optional GObj, affecting HSD_SisLib_803A5A2C, HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4, HSD_SisLib_803A5D30, HSD_SisLib_803A5DA0, and HSD_SisLib_803A5E70.
Factored the text cleanup portion of HSD_SisLib_803A5DA0 into static inline HSD_SisLib_803A5DA0_inline0, likely to reproduce compiler inlining/codegen patterns.
Simplified archive/camera array initialization and teardown loops in HSD_SisLib_803A5FBC and HSD_SisLib_803A6048 by indexing the 5-entry arrays directly.
Rewrote HSD_SisLib_803A611C with clearer count/camera allocation logic, using HSD_CObjLoadDesc on the new camera descriptor, GObj setup calls, and gxlink priority expression `(u64) 1 << arg5`.
Matched SIS string/control-code copy and insertion helpers by replacing m2c-style temporaries with pointer-walking code in HSD_SisLib_803A6478, HSD_SisLib_803A6530, and HSD_SisLib_803A660C.
Added HSD_SisLib_803A7548(HSD_Text*, int, float, float), which locates a text command via fn_803A6FEC and writes two fixed-point-ish byte pairs derived from the float arguments.
Changed HSD_SisLib_803A7548's header prototype from three arguments to four and updated un_802FCF38 to call `HSD_SisLib_803A7548(un_804D6D78, 0, 0.4f, 0.55f)`.

Changed several sislib function argument types from narrow s8/u16 or UNK_T to int/HSD_Text* where that matched callsites/codegen: HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC, HSD_SisLib_803A611C, HSD_SisLib_803A6754, HSD_SisLib_803A84BC, and HSD_SisLib_803A7548.
Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt to split HSD_SisLib_8040C4B8 size from 0x68 to 0x38, add several HSD_SisLib_8040C4F0..8040C54C data:string symbols, and realign hsd_8040FF80/lbl_80410000 sizes.
decomp.dev reported new full matches for HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC, 803A660C, 803A611C, 803A5DA0, 803A6368, 803A62A0, 803A5E70, 803A5D30, 803A5A2C, 803A5CC4, 803A5FBC, 803A6478, and 803A6530.
smart_moves: Treating HSD_SisLib_8040C4B8 as a concrete HSD_CameraDescPerspective with two HSD_WObjDesc references resolved a data-layout problem and enabled cleaner camera-loading code.
Splitting .data symbols into the actual camera descriptor plus following strings avoided over-large aggregate symbols and preserved later data/jumptable boundaries.
Recognizing x50 as the HSD_Text next pointer and x54 as the optional GObj fixed several list traversal/freeing functions at once.
Using a tiny static inline helper for the first half of HSD_SisLib_803A5DA0 reused exact cleanup logic while giving the compiler a better chance to match expected inlined code.
Replacing guessed pointer constants like `+ 0xC` with `sizeof(sislib_UnkAllocData)` or typed `+ 1` clarified allocator intent and matched generated pointer arithmetic.
Updating downstream callsites immediately after changing HSD_SisLib_803A7548's signature kept header and use sites consistent and revealed the missing text-command index parameter.
Casting the concrete camera descriptor only at the HSD_CObjLoadDesc call kept the data declaration precise while satisfying the existing loader API.
decomp_lessons: For baselib data objects, do not assume one symbol covers a whole blob: inspect following strings/alignment and split symbols when the descriptor size is smaller than the old label span.
When list code looks wrong, validate struct field roles against multiple functions. Here x50/x54 confusion affected deletion, teardown, and GObj unlink paths.
Prototype corrections can unlock both local matches and unrelated caller fixes; HSD_SisLib_803A7548 required an extra int parameter and a callsite update in un_2FC9.c.
Static/private data should be made static when only used in the translation unit; this can affect symbol visibility and matching assumptions.
Small OSReport string differences, especially trailing newlines and unused format arguments, matter for rodata/data layout and function matching.
Control-code bytecode/string helpers often match best as direct pointer walks with fallthrough switch cases rather than m2c-style temporary-heavy code.
Camera/GObj setup code may require preserving exact integer widths and bit expressions, such as `(u64) 1 << arg5`, rather than superficially equivalent-looking arithmetic.
naming_conventions: Kept unknown-address naming for unresolved sislib symbols, e.g. HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC and HSD_SisLib_8040C4B8.
Used local names like curr, next, last, count, gobj, alloc, and size to replace register-derived m2c temporaries where the role was clear.
Named the forced inline helper with the project-style function prefix plus suffix: HSD_SisLib_803A5DA0_inline0.
Removed the obsolete placeholder type sislib_UnknownType001 once the data was identified as HSD_WObjDesc/HSD_CameraDescPerspective.
Retained fn_803A60EC/fn_803A6FEC where names were still unknown, adding comments rather than inventing semantic names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used concrete initialized data structures to match .data layout before addressing affected codegen.
Used static inline extraction to reproduce an inlined cleanup sequence inside HSD_SisLib_803A5DA0.
Changed argument types to int in places where narrower types likely introduced unwanted casts/sign-extension.
Used scoped temporaries, such as a local u8 tmp before HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, to shape register allocation/codegen.
Replaced array pointer increment loops with indexed for-loops for the 5-entry archive/SIS arrays where that matched output.
Used switch fallthrough in HSD_SisLib_803A6478 and HSD_SisLib_803A660C to match compact control-code copy/skip behavior.
Added a TODO noting a probable file boundary before fn_803A6FEC because its data section is 8-byte aligned after preceding C strings.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.
Automated decomp.dev feedback reported matched code increased by +0.08% / +3048 bytes.
Automated report listed 13 new full matches in main/sysdolphin/baselib/sislib.
Automated report listed 3 improved unmatched sislib functions: HSD_SisLib_803A7548 to 97.37%, HSD_SisLib_803A5798 to 96.36%, and HSD_SisLib_803A6048 to 97.56%.
Automated report listed one small regression: HSD_SisLib_803A84BC from 43.95% to 43.86% (-3 bytes).
follow_up_queries: Check later PRs for final matching of HSD_SisLib_803A7548, HSD_SisLib_803A5798, HSD_SisLib_803A6048, and HSD_SisLib_803A84BC.
Search for subsequent renames of sislib_UnkAllocData, sislib_UnkAlloc3, HSD_Text fields x50/x54/x64/x68, and fn_803A6FEC.
Look for follow-up symbol/data boundary fixes around HSD_SisLib_8040C4F0 through HSD_SisLib_8040C564 and lbl_80410000.
Verify whether the TODO about a file boundary before fn_803A6FEC was resolved by splitting sislib.c or adjusting build/config metadata.
